overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes various commercial buildings, billboards, and pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk past red commercial buildings and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red building with yellow and black hazard stripes on the lower level
large illuminated advertisement showing a woman in purple clothing
metal pedestrian bridge crossing above the street
white sign with black text indicating speed limit 40
green curved architectural structure on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered commercial walkway at night, characterized by neon lighting and a prominent red building on the right. The player walks forward past digital billboards and a speed limit sign, with the environment enclosed by overhead structures. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky
black vehicle drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large building with dark green exterior and multiple windows
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with partial sky visibility. The player crosses the asphalt road while vehicles pass through. A large green building dominates the left side, and overhead bridge structures become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with industrial piping

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath large industrial overhead pipes

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath massive industrial pipes and purple neon lighting

entered.detail: massive cylindrical metal pipes running along the right side of the walkway
rolled-down metal security shutters on storefronts
continuous purple neon strip lighting illuminating the right wall

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered walkway dominated by large industrial pipes running overhead and along the right side. Purple neon lighting casts a glow on closed metal shutters. The player continues walking forward as the scene takes on a more industrial cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with auto parts store and adult entertainment venue

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass by on the left
passing the brightly lit adult club with prominent pink neon signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the road and walking past the autoparts store and 18+ club entrance

notable_agents.action: group of people standing outside the entrance to the 18+ club

entered.detail: storefront with green and red 'AUTOPARTS' signage
storefront with bright pink neon '18+' sign and suggestive imagery
red metal scaffolding with white barriers on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street and enters a commercial zone featuring an autoparts store and a prominently lit adult club with pink neon signage. Scaffolding structures line the sidewalk, and small groups of pedestrians gather near the club entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with large digital billboards

events.description: approaching large intersection with towering ALL FOODS digital billboard
entering covered area beneath large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the large intersection toward the ALL FOODS billboard and entering the underpass area

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive purple hair walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying ALL FOODS advertisement with clown character
tall building with large white '06' numerals on the facade
large cylindrical concrete support pillar for the overpass
massive elevated highway or transit structure spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major commercial intersection dominated by a massive ALL FOODS digital billboard and a building marked '06'. The player crosses the wide street with moderate pedestrian traffic, passing palm trees and concrete pillars before entering the shadow of a large overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from enclosed commercial walkways into wide, industrial urban intersections. It begins under the cover of a commercial walkway with red neon accents and digital billboards, moving forward past sparse pedestrians beneath overhead structures. As the path opens into a wide intersection, the camera crosses an asphalt road flanked by a large green building and towering bridge structures against the night sky. The scene then shifts into a more industrial zone characterized by massive overhead pipes and purple neon lighting reflecting off metal shutters, before transitioning across another street toward a commercial district featuring an autoparts store and a pink-lit adult club. Finally, the movement leads toward a major intersection dominated by a massive All Foods digital billboard and palm trees, ending as the camera passes concrete pillars and enters the shadow of a large overpass.
